headline: UNDI18 Voter Turnout Among Youth Only 38% in 2025
context: The 2025 state elections saw historically low turnout among newly eligible 18-20 year old voters.

cards.big: Only 38% of 18-20 year old registered voters cast ballots in 2025
cards.sub: UNDI18 added 5.8 million new voters but engagement remains weak

cards.big: SPR registered 1.2 million youth voters automatically under UNDI18 since 2022
cards.sub: Automatic registration did not translate to automatic participation

cards.big: Youth political knowledge survey shows 67% cannot name their MP in 2025
cards.sub: Civic education in schools remains limited to 2 periods per week

cards.big: Indonesia's youth voter turnout reached 78% in their 2024 general election
cards.sub: Targeted voter education campaigns credited for higher participation

cards.big: Lowering voting age without civic investment just inflates the disengaged electorate
Is compulsory voting the answer to youth political apathy in Malaysia
